title: Caramelized Portuguese Pork Wrap
description: Indulge in the rich flavors of Portugal with this caramelized pork wrap, featuring a sweet and sticky sauce, served in a traditional lacquerware bowl.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small saucepan, combine brown sugar, soy sauce, garlic, and ginger, and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the sauce for 10 minutes, or until it thickens and caramelizes.
Season the pork shoulder with salt and black pepper.
In a large skillet, heat the sesame oil over medium-high heat, then sear the pork shoulder until browned on all sides.
Transfer the pork to a lacquerware bowl and brush the caramelized sauce all over the pork.
Wrap the pork in ssam wrap pieces and top with green onions.
Serve the pork wrap hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
